query:
SELECT eda.id, eda.epiDeliveryId, eda.epi_nome, eda.valor_total, eda.status, eda.companyId,
       ed.id as delivery_exists
FROM epi_discount_alerts eda
LEFT JOIN epi_deliveries ed ON eda.epiDeliveryId = ed.id
WHERE eda.status = 'pendente'
LIMIT 5;
